classObjective: Convert between recursive and explicit formulas for arithmetic and geometric sequences.
workedExamples: 8-6, Example 3 — Write a Recursive Formula for a Sequence
8-6, Example 4 — Convert a Recursive Formula to an Explicit Formula
8-6, Example 5 — Convert an Explicit Formula to a Recursive Formula
8-6, Example 6 — Convert Between Forms for Real-World Recursive Models
warmUp: Write an explicit formula from the recursive: a_1 = 5, a_n = a_{n-1} + 3
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: converting both directions; real-world recursive models; explicit formula derivation from recursion
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice converting between recursive and explicit forms for arithmetic and geometric sequences
independentPractice: Practice problems converting between recursive and explicit formulas for various sequences
assessment: Exit ticket: convert a_n = 100(0.85)^{n-1} to recursive form
capReflection: What are the advantages of each form (recursive vs. explicit) in different situations?
